title: Callista monophylla
taxonomy: Callista monophylla is classified as a species of saltwater clam, belonging to the family Veneridae. It is a marine bivalve mollusk. The classification of Callista monophylla further extends to the order Veneroida, and the phylum Mollusca. This classification suggests that the species shares characteristics and relationships with other saltwater clams within its phylum and order. The kingdom it belongs to is Animalia.
